ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrency_market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "price_diff" REAL /* Difference between the highest and lowest prices */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Measure of price variability over the given period */,
  "source_exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange from which the market data was sourced */,
  "source_api" TEXT /* API or data source from which the market data was retrieved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cryptocurrency_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cryptocurrency_market_data_source_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_code" TEXT /* Code or symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's whitepaper */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the cryptocurrency */,
  "block_time" REAL /* Average time for a new block to be added to the blockchain */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency, if applicable */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the trading pair */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the trading pair */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the trading pair is listed */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* Trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_change_24h" REAL /* Change in trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* Price of the last trade for the trading pair */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Highest bid price for the trading pair */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Lowest ask price for the trading pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading pair entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading pair entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the exchange was founded */,
  "fee_structure" TEXT /* Description of the fee structure for trading on the exchange */,
  "trading_volume_24h" REAL /* Trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "supported_cryptos" TEXT /* List of cryptocurrencies supported by the exchange (comma-separated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "kyc_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's Know Your Customer (KYC) verification */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "preferred_cryptos" TEXT /* List of preferred cryptocurrencies (comma-separated) */,
  "alert_thresholds" TEXT /* List of alert thresholds (comma-separated) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* User's preferred time zone */,
  "language" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Preferred type of chart (e.g., line, candlestick) */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the user prefers email notifications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of user activity (e.g., login, logout, trade) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the user activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user activity was logged */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the user activity was logged */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user activity */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user activity was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily summary, trend analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report (JSON format) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, JSON) */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked */,
  "alert_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the alert should remain active */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Custom message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_method" TEXT /* Method by which the alert should be delivered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
